name: Classic Thai Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add the red curry paste and stir-fry until it releases its aroma.
4. Add the tofu and cook another 3 minutes.
5. Add the rice, mix, and fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add the soy sauce, green onion, and cilantro; transfer to a serving dish.
7. Garnish with thinly sliced cucumber and additional chopped green onions.
8. Serve with clear soup and a salad. This makes a complete meal on its own.
9. For chili vinegar garnish: Chop half a cup of fresh green and red chilies into small pieces. Combine with 1½ cups rice vinegar and 1 tablespoon soy sauce. Serve immediately. Refrigerated, it will keep for several weeks.
